message:
refactor(protocol,command): add RespFrame::Sequence for multi-message pub/sub replies

Introduce a new Sequence variant to RespFrame that encodes multiple
independent RESP protocol messages back-to-back without wrapping them
in an Array frame. This replaces the previous Array-of-Arrays workaround
that incorrectly bundled per-channel pub/sub acknowledgments into a
single compound response.

Protocol layer (fr-protocol):
- Add RespFrame::Sequence(Vec<RespFrame>) variant
- Implement encode_into that serializes each contained frame directly
- Add test validating back-to-back encoding behavior

Command layer (fr-command):
- Update all pub/sub command handlers to emit Sequence instead of Array:
  SUBSCRIBE, UNSUBSCRIBE, PSUBSCRIBE, PUNSUBSCRIBE, SSUBSCRIBE,
  SUNSUBSCRIBE
- Remove now-obsolete comments explaining the Array-of-Arrays workaround

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
